name: preusx-django-admin-extensions

metadata.name: preusx-django-admin-extensions
metadata.summary: Utilities and extensions for django administration panel.

documentation:
# Django admin extensions

Utilities and extensions for django administration panel.

Docs here: [https://preusx.gitlab.io/django-admin-extensions](https://preusx.gitlab.io/django-admin-extensions)
# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

## [0.1.5]
### Fixed
- Many to many admin changelist injector issue fix.

## [0.1.4]
### Added
- Many to many admin changelist editable fields.

## [0.1.1]
Initial version.

documentation: Return package version as listed in `__version__` in `init.py`.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.filters.method.MethodFilter

methods.name: pxd_admin_extensions.filters.method.MethodFilter.as_filter
documentation:
Factory for easier filter generation.

Args:
    parameter_name (str): Parameter to bind this filter.
    method (str, optional): Method to call. Defaults to None.
    title ([type], optional): Filters title. Defaults to None.
Simple admin filter to call queryset's method if selected as `yes`.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.filters.text_input.TextInputFilter

methods.name: pxd_admin_extensions.filters.text_input.TextInputFilter.value
documentation:
Returns the value (in string format) provided in the request's
query string for this filter, if any. If the value wasn't provided then
returns None.

methods.name: pxd_admin_extensions.filters.text_input.TextInputFilter.expected_parameters
documentation:
Returns the list of parameter names that are expected from the
request's query string and that will be used by this filter.
Renders simple eq admin filter form with text input and submit button.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.annotations.ListAnnotatorAdminMixin
documentation:
Mixin to easily add annotated fields to a select.

Property `list_annotations` may be filled with an annotations definitions:

Example:
    ```python
    class SomeAdmin:
        list_annotations = (
            ('participants', models.Count, 'participants_count'),
        )
    ```

    Where:

    - The field name to manupulate(might be None if function does not require it to be).
    - The second parameter is the callable that receives field and
        does something with it.
        Must return data that can be used as annotation.
    - Third parameter - is the resulting field name. May not be present,
        in that case the name will be `self.LIST_ANNOTATIONS_PREFIX + field`.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.multidb.using_kwarg_factory
documentation:
Simple method wrapper to get a default using parameter.

Args:
    func (Callable): Wrapped method.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.multidb.UsableAdminBaseMixin
documentation:
Simpe mixin to apply default database key to the queryset resolver.

ModelAdmin attribute `using` is for controlling which database
the QuerySet will be evaluated against if you are using more than
one database. The value is the alias of a database, as defined in DATABASES.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.multidb.UsableForeignMixin
documentation: Mixin to add self `using` kwarg usage to ModelAdmin for foreign fields.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.multidb.MultiDBModelAdmin
documentation:
Admin to search/create/change objects from non-default database.

ModelAdmin attribute `using` is for controlling which database
the QuerySet will be evaluated against if you are using more than
one database. The value is the alias of a database, as defined in DATABASES.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.contrib.stats.utils.stat_legend
documentation:
Simplifier for statistics legend definition.

Args:
    key (str): Legend key.
    title (str, optional): Legend's title. Defaults to None.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.contrib.stats.utils.stat
documentation:
Statistics resolver method wrapper.
Registers a new statistics block to display and with what inside.

Args:
    title (str, optional): Block title. Defaults to None.
    legend (List[str], optional): List of field descriptors.
        Defaults to ().
    key (str, optional): Stat block unique key. Defaults to None.
    y (str, optional): Y axis key. Defaults to None.
    x (str, optional): X axis key. Defaults to None.
    template_name (str, optional): Django template name to use for block
        rendering.
        Defaults to None.
    config (dict, optional): Additional data to configure block.
        Defaults to {}.

Example:
    ```python
    @register_stats(ExistingModelAdmin, model=ExistingModel)
    class ExistingModelStatsAdmin:
        @stat(_('Participants per domain'), (
            stat_legend('domain', _('Domain')),
            stat_legend('participants_count', _('Participants count')),
        ), config={'type': 'pie', 'labelType': 'percent'})
        def get_participants_per_domain(self, request, qs):
            return (
                qs
                .values('domain')
                .annotate(participants_count=models.Count(
                    'participants__participant_id', distinct=True
                ))
                .order_by('domain')
            )
    ```

    By default every `stat` must return list of dicts with some valuable
    stats data. That will be then transformed using legend and config
    into a required chart.

documentation: Normalizes fields definition.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.manytomany_changelist.append_injector
documentation: Simple injector that injects field at the end of the list.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.manytomany_changelist.after_injector
documentation: Factory that returns an injector that injects field after the given field.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.manytomany_changelist.make_form
documentation: Generates form class for the given fields.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.manytomany_changelist.make_view
documentation: Generates view class for the given fields.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.manytomany_changelist.make_admin_parts
documentation:
Generates changelist form and view classes for the given fields.

Args:
    fields (FieldsDefinition): List of fields definitions to inject.
    default_injector (callable, optional): Default injector function. Defaults to append_injector.
    base_view_class (type, optional): Base view class. Defaults to InjectableChangeList.
    form_bases (Sequence[type], optional): Base classes for resulting form. Defaults to [].

Returns:
    Tuple: Form and view classes.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.manytomany_changelist.make_admin_methods
documentation:
Generates admin editable field injection methods for the given fields.

Args:
    fields (FieldsDefinition): List of fields definitions to inject.
    default_injector (callable, optional): Default injector function. Defaults to append_injector.
    base_view_class (type, optional): Base view class. Defaults to InjectableChangeList.
    form_bases (Sequence[type], optional): Base classes for resulting form. Defaults to [].

Returns:
    Tuple: Two methods: `get_changelist_form` and `get_changelist_view`.

documentation: ChangeList view class with injection methods.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.contrib.jet.multidb.MultiDBCompactInline
documentation: Compact inline for multidb usage.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.contrib.stats.factories.create_simple_proxy_model
documentation:
Factory to create "empty" proxy model.

Args:
    Model (type): Base model to inherit from.
    postfix (str, optional): Postfix for model to have unique name.
        Defaults to 'Proxy'.
    verbose_name (str, optional): Model's verbose name. Defaults to None.
    verbose_name_plural (str, optional): Model's plural verbose name.
        Defaults to None.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.contrib.stats.factories.register_stats
documentation:
Factory to generate admin panel for statistics display.

Args:
    underlying_admin (ModelAdmin): Current admin class.
    registerer (Callable, optional): Admin registerer.
        Defaults to admin.register.
    stats_admin (type, optional): Base class with admin statistics
        imlementation.
        Defaults to StatsAdmin.
    model (Model, optional): Model to add stats for. Defaults to None.

documentation: Return admin change url for given object

documentation: Return admin change url for given object

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.changelist_template_names.ChangeListCustomTemplateNameAdminMixin
documentation:
Simple mixin to made auto-generatable template paths out of template name.

It mimics default django admin template resolving behavior, but it changes
default `change_list` template name to thw one from
`self.change_list_template_name` attribute.

classes.name: pxd_admin_extensions.form_types.FormTypeAdminMixin
documentation:
Mixin that let you use different forms for different object
manupulation scenarios:

- `changelist_form` - Special form for changelist admin view.
- `add_form` - Special form for object creation.
- `change_form` - Special form for object update mechanics.

All those forms will fallback to a default one if none provided.

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.decorators.admin_link_field
documentation:
Decorator used for rendering a link to a related model in
the admin detail page.
attr (str):
    Name of the related field.
short_description (str):
    Name if the field.
empty_description (str):
    Value to display if the related field is None.
The wrapped method receives the related object and should
return the link text.
Usage:
    @admin_link('credit_card', _('Credit Card'))
    def credit_card_link(self, credit_card):
        return credit_card.name

functions.name: pxd_admin_extensions.decorators.admin_changelist_link_field
documentation:
Decorator used for rendering a link to the list display of
a related model in the admin detail page.
attr (str):
    Name of the related field.
short_description (str):
    Field display name.
empty_description (str):
    Value to display if the related field is None.
query_string (function):
    Optional callback for adding a query string to the link.
    Receives the object and should return a query string.
The wrapped method receives the related object and
should return the link text.
Usage:
    @admin_changelist_link('credit_card', _('Credit Card'))
    def credit_card_link(self, credit_card):
        return credit_card.name

    @admin_changelist_link(
        'products',
        _('Products'),
        query_string=lambda c: 'category_id={}'.format(c.pk)
    )
    def products_link(self, products):
        return _('Products')
